steps.title: Convert each percent
steps.content: Fertilizer A is $60\%$ filler, so $x$ pounds of Fertilizer A contributes $0.6x$ pounds of filler. Fertilizer B is $40\%$ filler, so $y$ pounds of Fertilizer B contributes $0.4y$ pounds of filler.

steps.title: Add the filler amounts
steps.content:
The total amount of filler is $240$ pounds, so the model is
$$0.6x+0.4y=240$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: The expression with $0.6x$ for Fertilizer A and $0.4y$ for Fertilizer B matches the required total filler equation. The answer is B.
